title: Floral Dense Ethiopian Cabbage Stew
description: A comforting, spice‑laden cabbage stew with a floral hint of hibiscus, perfect for soothing hangovers and packed with plant‑based protein.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and ginger; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in berbere spice mix and tomato paste; cook 1–2 minutes, stirring well.
Add chopped cabbage, diced tomatoes, chickpeas, and dried hibiscus flowers; stir to combine.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a simmer, cover, and reduce heat to low. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until cabbage is tender and flavors meld.
Stir in coconut milk and lemon juice; season with salt and pepper to taste. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes to heat through.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. If stew is too thin, simmer uncovered for a few more minutes until desired thickness.
Remove from heat, let rest for 5 minutes to thicken further.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of dried hibiscus if desired.
